title: Ethromite
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Ethromite''' was a mineral used to power the fusion engines of starships. It was mined in the asteroid belts surrounding [[Ithor/Legends|Ithor]]. [[Mining Station Alpha]] was one of several small mining outposts dedicated to extracting ethromite ore from asteroidal rock and shipping it back to Ithor. When [[Mammon Hoole]]'s starship, the [[Shroud (starship)|''Shroud'']], escaped Imperial forces on [[S'krrr]], he landed on the [[Ithorian Herdship]] ''[[Tafanda Bay]]'' in low orbit of Ithor to have his ethromite supplies replenished.

==Appearances==
*''[[Galaxy of Fear: Spore]]'' {{1st}}
